hero.sub: Experience the future of audio. Our electrostatic speakers pair an in-house ultra-coated diaphragm with a patented electrode design — for clarity and transparency conventional drivers simply can't reach.

features.title: Detail beyond the reach of traditional speakers.
features.p: A suite of proprietary technologies works together to reproduce every trace of sound pure, transparent and true to the source.
features.f1p: The ultra-thin diaphragm surface uses a dual-metal coating design to optimise electron distribution and charge adhesion, significantly improving electrostatic drive efficiency and precisely restoring true sound detail.
features.f2p: The electrode plate uses patented technologies in material selection, vent-hole design and distribution, effectively improving sound focus while reducing echo interference.
features.f3p: Combining multiple patented technologies, the electrostatic unit maintains excellent performance in a smaller volume, with a wider and clearer sonic range.
features.f4p: An electrostatic speaker uses two high-voltage electrode plates to drive an ultra-thin conductive diaphragm between them. The audio signal creates an alternating electric field, moving the diaphragm with the waveform to push air. Because the diaphragm is extremely light and almost inertia-free, it delivers fast response, low distortion, wide frequency response and high resolution.
features.f5p: Traditional coils and paper cones carry mass, slowing transient response and weakening musical detail and layering; cone materials and cabinet structures can also add coloration, resonance, standing waves and box echo. Our low-mass electrostatic diaphragm and open acoustic design reduce mechanical inertia and cabinet interference, making sound faster, purer and more natural.
features.f6p: Multiple proprietary technologies form the foundation of pure sound. From the ultra-thin coated diaphragm and patented electrode plate to the low-interference acoustic structure, every element is designed for speed, transparency and low distortion. These technologies work as an integrated system, making the sound purer, more natural and deeply listenable.

life.h: Unleash electrostatic sound in your home.
life.p: A hybrid tower that disappears into a modern room and fills it with a wide, holographic soundstage — every note pure and transparent.

spot.p: Our reference floorstander mates a full-height electrostatic panel — built on our ultra-coated diaphragm and patented stator — with a dynamic woofer for weight and reach, all in a hand-finished gloss-wood cabinet.

craft.title: Two engineers, years in the making.
craft.p: Two long-time acquaintances whose collaboration began with a conversation at an audio show. Years of joint development later, they reached breakthroughs in bias stability and diaphragm-tension control — now protected by patents in multiple countries.
craft.role1: Acoustic & Electronic Engineering Consultant · Ohio, USA
craft.bio1: An electronic-engineering major with 20+ years in the R&D departments of high-end North American audio makers. He brings the discipline of taking a design from lab to production — component control, reliability testing and voicing, with no compromises.
craft.role2: Electronics Engineer · Audio Researcher · Co-developer of the electrostatic unit
craft.bio2: Over 40 years in electronics and nearly 20 in audio. Drawing on deep technical roots, he systematically studied where other brands' electrostatics fall short — bias-circuit stability, insulation and arcing, diaphragm materials and stator structure — and broke through them one by one.

about.h: Sound that's clearer and more real than ever.
about.p: Born from three decades of audio engineering and a relentless pursuit of pure, transparent sound — Able Audio Tech builds the next generation of electrostatic speakers.

aboutPage.title: The science of pure sound.
aboutPage.intro: Three decades of audio engineering, distilled into a new generation of electrostatic speakers — clearer and more real than ever.
aboutPage.companyH: Thirty years in pursuit of pure sound.
aboutPage.companyP1: Able Audio Technology Company Limited's R&D team and engineers have over 30 years of experience in audio system design and installation, with a strong focus on loudspeaker and cabinet sound quality. Aware of the inherent limitations of traditional dynamic speakers, such as slower transient response, cabinet coloration and distortion, we turned our attention to electrostatic loudspeaker technology.
aboutPage.companyP2: Inspired by the speed, detail and low distortion of electrostatic designs, our team has spent years improving their efficiency and practicality for home use. In 2024, we achieved a breakthrough in materials and manufacturing processes and filed patents for our core innovations. The result is a compact electrostatic panel of approximately 30 cm × 40 cm that offers roughly four times the efficiency of comparable products, while extending bandwidth to cover the mid, high and ultra-high frequency range.
aboutPage.designP1: Our compact electrostatic panel measures roughly 30 × 40 cm, yet delivers about four times the efficiency of comparable products — extending bandwidth across the mid, high and ultra-high frequencies.
aboutPage.designP2: We pair patented electrostatic drivers for the mids and highs with dynamic woofers for the bass, achieving both high efficiency and high sound quality in a compact form factor made for the home.
aboutPage.d1p: Patented electrostatic panels reproduce voices and fine detail with effortless speed and transparency.
aboutPage.d2p: Dedicated dynamic woofers add weight and reach beneath the panel, for true full-range sound.
aboutPage.d3p: A roughly 30 × 40 cm panel delivers high efficiency in a footprint that disappears into a modern home.
aboutPage.diaLead: A newly engineered diaphragm featuring a dual-metal coating on an ultra-thin film.
aboutPage.diaP1: It optimises electron distribution and charge retention, significantly enhancing electrostatic driving efficiency. Improved acoustic energy conversion delivers more responsive, direct sound reproduction — with unprecedented detail and transparency.
aboutPage.diaP2: Our patented acoustic structure precisely directs sound waves, enhancing focus while suppressing the energy dispersion and echo caused by environmental reflections — for crystal-clear imaging with distinct front-to-back and side-to-side layering.
aboutPage.diaF1: Dual-metal coating on an ultra-thin film
aboutPage.panelLead: Patented side panels made from a multi-material composite, hot-pressed under high temperature and pressure.
aboutPage.panelP1: The result is superior rigidity and stability. Each panel integrates 19 through-channels of varying diameters, precisely engineered to absorb and dissipate low-frequency cabinet vibrations.
aboutPage.panelP2: By suppressing standing waves and parasitic resonances, the panels deliver noise reduction and resonance damping — enabling deeper, more controlled bass extension with a cleaner overall presentation.
aboutPage.ctaP: The clearest way to understand electrostatic sound is to listen for yourself. Get in touch to arrange a demo.

explorePage.title: Why electrostatic sounds different.
explorePage.intro: From the distortion built into every traditional driver to a near-massless film floating in an electric field — see, touch and play with the difference.
explorePage.s1P: Heavy cones, voice coils and resonant cabinets all leave their fingerprint on the music. This section will break down where that distortion comes from.
explorePage.s1d1P: The voice coil and paper cone carry real mass, so the diaphragm meets inertia and physical resistance as it moves, slowing how quickly the sound responds. A sluggish transient response makes it hard to fully reproduce the detail and layering in music. The cone material itself also colours the sound, adding coloration that keeps the audio from being truly pure and natural.
explorePage.s1d2P: The cabinet structure readily produces resonance, standing waves and acoustic reflections, creating a resonant echo (box sound) that strips the audio of its purity and layering, leaving it muddy and unclear.
explorePage.s2P: An ultra-thin conductive film, suspended between two charged stators, driven directly by the audio signal itself.
explorePage.s2p1: An electrostatic speaker is built from two parallel stator plates held at a high bias voltage, with an ultra-thin diaphragm suspended between them, its surface coated with a conductive layer. When the audio signal is applied to the stators, it creates an alternating electric field that drives the diaphragm to vibrate exactly with the signal's waveform, pushing the air to produce sound. Because the diaphragm is extremely light and nearly free of inertia, it responds instantly — delivering low distortion, wide frequency response and high resolution, ideal for high-precision audio systems.
explorePage.s2p2: With almost no inertia, the ultra-thin diaphragm lets every detail flow naturally — air, layering and imaging rendered with near-transparent precision. No cabinet coloration, only pure, faithful music. Whether in a high-end living-room system or an intimate listening space, it creates a sense of presence so real it feels like being there.
explorePage.s3Lead: One dividing line, three qualities — detail, clarity and purity. Electrostatic on the left, traditional on the right; see exactly where they differ, point by point.
explorePage.c1e1: The diaphragm is driven by an electric field — response is instant
explorePage.c1e2: The film is ultra-thin, with almost no inertia
explorePage.c2t1: Standing waves and reflections build up inside the cabinet
explorePage.ctaP: Numbers and animations only go so far — the difference is obvious within seconds of listening. Get in touch to arrange a demo.

reviews.title: Every note, pure and transparent.
reviews.p: Reviewers and owners on what electrostatic clarity sounds like once it's in the room.
reviews.r1p: The first time I heard a voice this present, I checked whether the singer was in the room. Electrostatics ruin you for everything else.
reviews.r2p: Micro-detail you didn't know was on the recording just appears. The panel is impossibly fast and clean.
reviews.r3p: The hybrid solves the classic electrostatic weakness — you get that transparency up top and real bass underneath it.
